Blocky Ruins
1
2
3
4

40
Source
Can be Mined
Resources
×2 ×1.6
Miscellaneous
"ruins_cavein_obstacle"
“It wouldn't fit in my pocket.”
–Wilson
“It's, like, a rock.”
–Willow
“Is hard! Like me!”
–Wolfgang
“Even that is not permanent.”
–Wendy
“LUMPY.”
–WX-78
“A large sedimentary rock.”
–Wickerbottom
“I could break it down if I tried hard enough.”
–Woodie
“It's a rock.”
–Maxwell
“Smash!”
–Wigfrid
“We'll need to mine it before we can use it.”
–Webber
“Don't you go rolling off on me.”
–Warly
“Rock. Hello”
–Wormwood
“What a shock! It's a rock!”
–Wortox
“Just a rock, florpt.”
–Wurt
“It would be more useful in smaller pieces.”
–Walter
“Ooooh a boulder, how unexpected.”
–Wanda
This is the Boulder species that appears after the Ancient Guardian encounter in Ruins Pillars.
